answer:
<think> The 1972 presidential election was between Richard Nixon and George McGovern. Nixon was the incumbent president and a member of the Republican Party, while McGovern was the nominee of the Democratic Party. I recall that Nixon won the election in a landslide, defeating McGovern in a significant margin. Therefore, George McGovern was the Democratic Party presidential nominee who lost to Richard Nixon in the 1972 presidential election. </think>
<answer> George McGovern </answer>
